title: score_tablet_completeness data payload
description: v0.34.0 fragment-vs-composition completeness estimator. Given a query fragment and a composition (explicit or inferred via identify_composition), returns sign_count_ratio + chunk_coverage_ratio against the composition's canonical-chunk backbone (length-20 hashes appearing in ≥2 exemplars). Useful for prioritizing reconstruction effort. Wrapped in StructuredEnvelope.

source.description: 'explicit' = caller-supplied composition_id. 'inferred' = identify_composition's top candidate (with confidence ≥ fallback_min). 'unresolved' = neither path succeeded — metrics will be null.

sign_count_ratio.description: query.sign_count / largest_exemplar.sign_count, clamped to [0,1]. null if signs cache unavailable or composition unresolved.

chunk_coverage_ratio.description: Fraction of the composition's canonical-chunk backbone (length-20 hashes in ≥2 exemplars) that the query hosts. null if chunk index unavailable or composition has no canonical chunks.

lacuna_density.description: Fraction of query tokens that are X/x/? (damage markers). High value indicates a partially-readable fragment.

preserved_chunk_hashes.description: Canonical chunks the query hosts. Empty unless include_chunk_lists=true.

missing_chunk_hashes.description: Canonical chunks the query does NOT host. Empty unless include_chunk_lists=true.
